title: US, UK central bankers offer contrary views on stablecoins
summary: Federal Reserve governor Christopher Waller told a conference on Sunday that stablecoins expand the reach of US policy while the Bank of England’s Megan Greene expects their popularity will soon fade.

title: Strategy's Michael Saylor teases BTC buy with 'working better' tweet
summary: Strategy could be set to announce it has resumed buying Bitcoin after pausing in recent weeks as the biggest crypto looks poised to close out the month down more than 3.5%.

title: Oil Climbs, Dollar Strengthens With No Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
summary: Oil climbed and the dollar strengthened as tensions remained elevated in the Middle East, with negotiations over a permanent US-Iran ceasefire showing little sign of a breakthrough.

title: China’s Shoppers Are Buying Luxury Again as Stock Market Rebounds
summary: Chinese consumers are showing signs of a renewed appetite for high-end beauty and fashion products, a rare bright spot for global luxury brands after years of weak demand and margin-eroding discounts in their most important growth market.

title: How President Trump’s Immigration Order Will Feed the Stablecoin Economy, Bitcoin ATMs
summary: When the Trump family faced pressure from banks, it embraced crypto. Now, immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally face a similar choice.

title: Florida Candidate Liquidates $800K in Bitcoin to Bankroll Congressional Bid
summary: A Republican candidate jockeying to represent Florida’s 22nd Congressional District liquidated Bitcoin to help fuel his political bid.

title: Dev helps rescue $2 million locked in 2016 ICO contract for nine years with whitehat exploit
summary: The developer told The Block that two of 48 eligible investors have already claimed 96.5 ETH that was unfrozen, worth nearly $200,000 at current prices.

title: Sui traces three mainnet halts to upgrade bugs, including a fix it knew carried halt risk
summary: The Sui Foundation said no user funds were at risk and credited AI agents with speeding up its diagnosis of the incidents.

title: Wall Street bulls bet US stocks rally will defy bubble fears
summary: Investors and strategists shrug off worries that markets could be overheating by betting on huge gains for AI-linked shares

title: AI is here. What do you want from it?
summary: The technology’s development belongs to everyone — share your vision with us
